mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, session_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, tool_execution_time, create_time, user_id FROM chat_history WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND id > #{afterId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, agent_id, session_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, tool_execution_time, create_time, user_id FROM chat_history WHERE id > #{afterId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 50
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_history (agent_id, session_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, tool_execution_time, create_time, user_id) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{toolCallId}, #{toolName}, #{toolArguments}, #{toolCallStatus}, #{toolExecutionTime}, #{createTime}, #{userId})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()

INSERT INTO chat_history (agent_id, session_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, tool_execution_time, create_time, user_id) VALUES
(#{item.agentId}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.role}, #{item.messageType}, #{item.content}, #{item.toolCallId}, #{item.toolName}, #{item.toolArguments}, #{item.toolCallStatus}, #{item.toolExecutionTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.userId})
